languages.text:
Unlocks the upgraded version of {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} that can be used in the same turn with other weapons.
This augment is considered a right hand's augment. Protects from the right hand's trauma.

traits.locale_text:
Unlocks the upgraded version of {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} that can be used in the same turn with other weapons.
This augment is considered a right hand's augment. Protects from the right hand's trauma.

languages.text:
This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

languages.text:
Эта модифицированная трансзвуковая пушка даёт Эоганну улучшенную версию способности {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Трансзвуковая волна{/g}. Она не входит в лимит атак за ход.
Этот аугмент считается установленным в инсерцию правой руки. Эоганн не может получить {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалеченную правую руку{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Эта модифицированная трансзвуковая пушка даёт Эоганну улучшенную версию способности {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Трансзвуковая волна{/g}. Она не входит в лимит атак за ход.
Этот аугмент считается установленным в инсерцию правой руки. Эоганн не может получить {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалеченную правую руку{/g}.

Эта модифицированная трансзвуковая пушка даёт Эоганну улучшенную версию способности {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Трансзвуковая волна{/g}. Она не входит в лимит атак за ход.
Этот аугмент считается установленным в инсерцию правой руки. Эоганн не может получить {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}покалеченную правую руку{/g}.

languages.text:
Este cañón transónico modificado otorga a Eogunn una versión mejorada de la capacidad {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Onda transónica{/g}. No cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno.
Se considera que este aumento es un injerto de lado diestro. Eogunn no puede sufrir un {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Este cañón transónico modificado otorga a Eogunn una versión mejorada de la capacidad {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Onda transónica{/g}. No cuenta para el límite de ataques por turno.
Se considera que este aumento es un injerto de lado diestro. Eogunn no puede sufrir un {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}brazo derecho lisiado{/g}.

languages.text:
Diese modifizierte Transschallkanone gewährt Eogunn eine verbesserte Version der Fähigkeit {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transschallwelle{/g}. Diese fließt nicht in das Angriffslimit pro Zug ein.
Diese Augmentation wird als Geschicklichkeitseinsatz gewertet. Eogunn kann keinen {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}verkrüppelten rechten Arm{/g} erleiden.
languages.original_text:
This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Diese modifizierte Transschallkanone gewährt Eogunn eine verbesserte Version der Fähigkeit {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transschallwelle{/g}. Diese fließt nicht in das Angriffslimit pro Zug ein.
Diese Augmentation wird als Geschicklichkeitseinsatz gewertet. Eogunn kann keinen {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}verkrüppelten rechten Arm{/g} erleiden.

languages.text:
Ce canon modifié confère à Eogunn la version améliorée de la capacité {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Onde transsonique{/g}, qui n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour.
Cette augmentation est considérée comme une insertion dextre. Eogunn ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Bras droit mutilé{/g}.
languages.original_text:
This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Ce canon modifié confère à Eogunn la version améliorée de la capacité {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Onde transsonique{/g}, qui n'est pas déduite du nombre maximum d'attaques par tour.
Cette augmentation est considérée comme une insertion dextre. Eogunn ne peut pas souffrir de {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}Bras droit mutilé{/g}.

languages.text:
Bu modifiye transonik top, Eogunn'a {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonik Dalga{/g} kabiliyetinin geliştirilmiş hâlini kazandırır. Tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz.
Bu ogment, dekstral eklenti yuvasına takılmış kabul edilir. Eogunn, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kol{/g} travmasına uğrayamaz.
languages.original_text:
This modified transonic cannon grants Eogunn an upgraded version of the {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonic Wave{/g} ability. It does not count toward the attack limit per turn.
This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Bu modifiye transonik top, Eogunn'a {g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}Transonik Dalga{/g} kabiliyetinin geliştirilmiş hâlini kazandırır. Tur başına saldırı sınırından sayılmaz.
Bu ogment, dekstral eklenti yuvasına takılmış kabul edilir. Eogunn, {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}kötürüm sağ kol{/g} travmasına uğrayamaz.

languages.text:
改装后的穿梭音波炮赋予伊奥贡升级版{g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}穿梭音波{/g}能力。其不计入每回合的攻击上限。
此植入物视为右侧植入。伊奥贡不会{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右臂骨折{/g}。
languages.original_text:

This augment is considered to be in a dexterous insertion. Eogunn cannot suffer a {g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}crippled right arm{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
改装后的穿梭音波炮赋予伊奥贡升级版{g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}穿梭音波{/g}能力。其不计入每回合的攻击上限。
此植入物视为右侧植入。伊奥贡不会{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右臂骨折{/g}。

languages.text:
この改造超音速キャノンはエオガンに{g|f:c0dc6cf8887946e5910c64aa17ecb4c8}超音速波{/g}アビリティのアップグレード版を付与する。これはターンあたりの攻撃回数制限にカウントされない。
このオーグメティックは器用挿入部にあるものとみなされる。エオガンは{g|f:b6a0edb0040f450a8a0c85c1300d6548}右腕損傷{/g}を負わない。
